nasb.text: The words of the Lord are pure words; As silver tried in a furnace on the earth, refined seven times.

esv.text: The words of the Lord are pure words, like silver refined in a furnace on the ground, purified seven times.

cnv.text: 耶和華的言語是純淨的言語， 好像銀子在泥爐中煉過，精煉過七次一樣。

ccb.text: 耶和华的应许纯全， 就像在炉中炼过七次的银子。

csbs.text: 耶和华的言语是纯净的言语， 如同银子在地上的熔炉中被熬炼、精炼过七次。
